description: V1.7 canonical terrain and location-specific icon loop exists and is marked active.
evidence: Created V1_7_CANONICAL_TERRAIN_ICONS_LOOP_PROMPT.md, loop-v1-7-canonical-terrain-icons status directory, and ACTIVE_LOOP.md points to V1.7.

description: Geography sidecar knowledge base includes V1.7 terrain richness, per-location icon briefs, target definitions, and execution status.
evidence: WESTEROS_GEOGRAPHY_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md now contains section 0 with project goals, current execution status, asset entries, unresolved risks, V1.7 terrain requirements, and per-location icon briefs.

description: Twelve named location-specific node icon assets are generated and saved in the public asset directory.
evidence: Generated and cropped 12 files in apps/westeros-map/public/assets/westeros/generated/v17/nodes/map-node-<location-id>-v1.png from private source apps/westeros-map/private/generated-working/v17/location-node-icons-contact-sheet-v1-source.png.

description: Map nodes use location-id-specific icon assets before falling back to generic type assets.
evidence: MapNode.tsx now defines locationNodeArtMap and resolves nodeArt via location.id before falling back to nodeTypeArtMap[location.type].

description: E2E tests verify each known location uses a distinct named node icon rather than the shared castle icon.
evidence: tests/e2e/map.spec.ts asserts V1.7 file names for all 12 location IDs, verifies data-map-node-art-key equals the location ID, checks computed backgroundImage, and requires 12 distinct node art paths.

description: A V4 terrain-rich map strategy or asset is produced from the expanded geography brief.
evidence: Generated V4 terrain-rich map at apps/westeros-map/public/assets/westeros/generated/v17/westeros-sandtable-map-v4-terrain.png from private source apps/westeros-map/private/generated-working/v17/westeros-sandtable-map-v4-terrain-source.png; frontend natural size verified as 3762x2117.

description: New V1.7 generated assets are recorded in ASSET_MANIFEST.md and PRIVATE_REFERENCE_REGISTER.md.
evidence: ASSET_MANIFEST.md records V4 map, V3 historical map, and 12 V1.7 node icons; PRIVATE_REFERENCE_REGISTER.md records PRIV-REF-009 contact sheet source and PRIV-REF-010 V4 map source.

description: Screenshots prove the named icons and richer terrain direction are visible in the frontend.
typecheck, lint, unit tests, E2E tests, and production build pass after V1.7 icon and terrain changes.
evidence: npm run typecheck passed; npm run lint passed; npm run test:unit passed with 9 tests; npm run test:e2e passed with 12 tests; npm run build passed.
